goals.title: Deliver MENA to the Valley 2026 Cohort
goals.description: 31 founders confirmed. 23 deposits locked, $92K collected. 8 deposits remain unresolved after the Apr 15 target, but SF founder and partner momentum stayed strong through live introductions and meetings.

keyResults.text: 8 deposits still pending, $32K still outstanding after the Apr 15 target
SF execution week converted into live intros and meetings with Kate, CEQUENS/CloudCom and ecosystem operators

nextActions: Run direct deposit recovery with the 8 laggards and decide whether to escalate through calls or a tighter sequence
Turn SF introductions and meetings into founder confidence assets and closing proof
Attach bank details to remaining founder threads
Finalize virtual mentorship agenda for mid-May
recommendedActions: Prepare a backup plan if remaining 8 deposits are not collected by deadline
Draft a founder spotlight series to maintain engagement pre-immersion
Identify 2-3 additional SF corporate hosts as backup meeting venues
goals.notes: SF execution week is critical — need daily check-ins with Kate and CloudCom contacts. Yousra to lead founder comms.

followUps.text: Waiting for 8 founders to confirm deposit wire transfers
Waiting for final founder close plan on outstanding $32K

goals.title: Close 3+ Institutional Partnerships
goals.description: Monshaat remains the strongest institutional proof point, HBKU is still stalled in review, and Money Fellows plus CEQUENS/CloudCom activity expanded the institutional pipeline but not yet into signed scope.

keyResults.text: Monshaat signed and in delivery mode
HBKU partnership still awaiting final update and contract movement
Money Fellows US market entry workstream formalized with segment, regulatory, and financial modeling priorities

nextActions: Push Nada for HBKU contract movement this week
Turn Money Fellows into a scoped US market entry advisory workstream with a next-week strategy deliverable
Package Monshaat proof into the next partner deck
recommendedActions: Create a partnership pipeline tracker with stage gates
Develop a reusable partnership proposal template from Monshaat success
goals.notes: Money Fellows is now a clean strategic workstream rather than a loose meeting follow-up. Confirmed target segments are immigrant Rosca communities, credit invisible Americans, gig workers, and Muslim Americans. The current recommendation is to prioritize Muslim Americans and immigrant Rosca communities first, with Sharia-compliant positioning and localized community language at the core. Before go-to-market, the work needs two concrete tracks: US licensing/regulatory research and a financial model covering budget, ROI timeline, and pricing logic. Final output due next week is a strategy document with segment recommendations, financial modeling, and the marketing plan.

followUps.text: Waiting for Nada to send HBKU contract update
Waiting for Money Fellows strategy document package to be completed next week

goals.title: Launch AI Squad with 2+ Corporate Clients
goals.description: NVIDIA content and deck are ready, but no paying client has closed and AI Squad remains stuck at the commercial conversion stage.
nextActions: Turn the deck into 5 founder-led corporate outreach conversations
Use Money Fellows and CloudCom momentum to test AI Squad adjacency
Package NVIDIA proof into a sharper commercial pitch
Start a weekly AI Squad revenue review until first deal closes
recommendedActions: Identify 3 warm intros from existing network for AI Squad pilot
Create a case study from NVIDIA collaboration to use in outreach
Consider a freemium or pilot pricing model to land first client faster

followUps.text: Waiting for first corporate outreach responses

goals.title: Grow Network to 8,000+ Contacts
goals.description: Database remains at roughly 6,000 contacts. The broader 100-contact enrichment batch is still blocked pending approval, but 10 strategic contacts were enriched this cycle and VIP follow-ups remain overdue.

keyResults.text: 10 strategic contacts enriched this cycle to unblock near-term network quality
Resolve overdue VIP and founder follow-ups before growth push

nextActions: Secure approval for the full 100-contact enrichment batch
Clear overdue VIP follow-ups from April 7-8
Add new SF and IMF/World Bank contacts after this week's meetings
recommendedActions: Set up automated enrichment pipeline to avoid manual approval bottlenecks
Create a VIP follow-up cadence to prevent overdue contacts
goals.notes: Enrichment pipeline is still the bottleneck. This cycle improved the top 10 strategic profiles, but the full network growth push still depends on approval.

goals.title: Hit Annual Revenue Target
goals.description: Revenue target is still not formalized in VSDR, but $92K of founder deposits are already in, CloudCom/ARPU Plus momentum is active, and institutional revenue paths remain live.

keyResults.text: Annual revenue target still needs to be formally defined in VSDR
$92K founder deposits already collected toward Q2 cash generation
Convert current partnership pipeline into contracted revenue

nextActions: Define the annual revenue target inside VSDR this month
Track founder deposits plus partnership revenue in one operating view
recommendedActions: Build a revenue dashboard that combines deposits, partnerships, and AI Squad income
Set quarterly revenue milestones with clear owners

quarterlyGoals.title: Close all MENA to Valley deposits by Apr 15
Convert ARPU Plus / CloudCom into first US partnerships
